AI Automation Studio

Develop, deploy,
and evaluate AI
that ships.

Demodoc is the AI automation studio for high-growth scaleups — specializing in agentic research and content automation. We close the gap between generative AI demos and AI that actually runs in your sales and marketing motion.

develop → builddeploy → integrateevaluate → iterate
Explore agentic research → Book a consultation
// the deployment gap

Most AI never makes it
past the demo.

Sales and marketing teams at scaleups are surrounded by generative and agentic AI — and almost none of it is in production. Pilots stall. Outputs drift off-brand. No one trusts the signal.

The bottleneck isn't models. It's the absence of standards for building, deploying, and evaluating AI inside a real revenue motion. That's the gap Demodoc closes.

// services

Three specialties.
One AI-native studio.

◇
flagship

Agentic Research

Synthesize, analyze, and activate context — competitive intelligence, sentiment, account updates, and audience segmentation that fuels the right outreach.

▤
core

Content Automation

Customize content with your brand's tone of voice — standardized across announcements, SEO pages, blogs, social, and multimodal ad creative.

⌬
supplemental

Deploy

Integrate, evaluate, and iterate — custom agents wired to any model, CRM, cloud, comms, or design tool in your stack.

// the loop

Develop. Deploy. Evaluate.

Every engagement runs the same disciplined loop — the software development lifecycle, applied to AI in your revenue motion.

▸ develop Design and build agents and automations against your real workflows and brand standards.
▸ deploy Integrate into your existing stack — models, CRM, comms, workspace, and design tools.
▸ evaluate Sort high signals while neutralizing false positives and drift in tone of voice.
Start a project →
demodoc — agentic-research — /bin/research
demodoc@research:~$
Flagship Offering

Synthesize,
analyze, and
activate context.

Agentic research turns the noise around your market into comprehensive, high-signal intelligence on competitors, key accounts, and the buyers you want next — without drowning your team in false positives.

Request a research pilot →
// the problem

Research doesn't scale
by working harder.

There's no standard for running generative and agentic AI inside a sales and marketing org — so research stays manual, shallow, or both. Teams can't capture comprehensive, substantive, high-signal insight about competitors and key accounts, or about the buyers and users they're trying to reach, without flooding the pipeline with false positives.

Meanwhile the hours pile up: manual market research, endless content audits, and one-off personalization that never quite reaches scale.

// capabilities

Six agents. One
intelligence layer.

01

Sentiment Analysis

Track how users and buyers actually feel — across reviews, social, and community — as a continuous signal, not a one-time survey.

02

Competitive Intelligence

Monitor competitor moves, messaging, and positioning shifts, distilled into substantive insight instead of raw alerts.

03

Company Updates

Comprehensive tracking of customers and key accounts — funding, hiring, launches, and triggers worth acting on.

04

Brand & Reputation

Watch how your brand is perceived and surface reputation risks early, with high signal and low noise.

05

ICP & Persona Segmentation

Define and refine who you're really selling to, grounded in evidence rather than assumption.

06

Lookalike Identification

Find the accounts and buyers that mirror your best customers — your next pipeline, pre-qualified.

// the outcome

The right message.
The right moment.

Activated context means reaching the right user or buyer, at the right company, at the right time, with the right message — to attract, engage, and acquire your next customer.

who
right buyer

Content Automation

Customize content
with your brand's
tone of voice.

Generate content that's brand-compliant, technically precise, and search-optimized — then move it from idea to published in a fraction of the time.

Automate your content →
// the problem

On-brand, precise,
ranked — pick three.

Most teams trade one off against the others: content that's brand-compliant but generic, technically precise but invisible to search, or fast but off-voice. The content lifecycle — ideation, generation, editing, publication — stays slow and inconsistent.

Demodoc standardizes and normalizes your tone of voice across every format and channel, so quality and speed stop being a tradeoff.

// one voice, every surface

From announcement
to ad creative.

A single, normalized tone of voice — applied consistently across formats and channels.

⟳

Positioning and Messaging

True to product specifications yet highlights competitive differentiation.

◈

Launch Announcements

Product launch and feature release announcements that are unmistakably on brand every time.

✎

Blog & Social Posts

A steady cadence of on-voice posts across every channel, generated and edited in the loop.

⌖

SEO Web Pages

Search-optimized pages that rank without sacrificing brand voice or technical accuracy.

✉

Email Campaigns

Lifecycle and outbound email that stays consistent from subject line to signature.

▦

Multimodal Ad Creative

Copy and creative for digital ads, normalized to your brand system across formats.

Standardize your voice → See how we deploy

// what we build

Agents with tools.
Content on autopilot.

⌬

Tool-equipped agents

Deploy agents on proprietary or open-source LLMs, equipped to browse the web and social media, enrich company and contact data, and push updates straight to Slack or email.

▤

Branded content automation

Automate generation of on-brand content for web pages, email campaigns, social engagement, digital ads, and blog and social posts.

demodoc — about — /bin/whoami

About the Studio

Built by operators,
for operators.

Demodoc is an AI automation studio helping high-growth scaleups deploy agentic research and content automation that actually ships.

Anthony Walsh

Managing Director

Anthony brings 10 years of experience scaling growth for AI infrastructure and applications — at Meta, Atlassian, and pre-IPO startups.

That background is the throughline behind Demodoc: an operator who has built and shipped go-to-market systems inside fast-moving companies, now applying that discipline to the AI automation gap most teams can't cross alone.
